sectionOrderRules: Hero must include what the company builds, relevant geography if known and a primary CTA to request a quote.
Service summary should focus on concrete building work such as nybyggnation, tillbyggnad, råbyggnad or totalentreprenad rather than generic claims.
Project highlights should appear before the final CTA when reference material exists.
Trust proof must only use real signals such as F-skattsedel, försäkring, ID06, garantier or reference projects when supplied.
Sections should not repeat the same promise in multiple blocks.
Services intro must explain the type of building assignments the company takes on.
Service list items must be concrete and can group work by project type, for example villor, flerbostadshus, tillbyggnader or kommersiella byggnader.
If pricing is shown it should stay high-level and not imply fixed prices for complex construction projects without basis.
Each project item should describe the type of build, scope and outcome in honest terms.
Gallery and project list should support each other and avoid showing the same project twice with identical content.
This page should prioritize real completed or ongoing reference projects over generic stock copy.
Quote intro must tell visitors what information helps the company assess a building project.
Project scope form should ask for practical details such as project type, location, timeline and contact details when the form dossier supports it.
Any mention of response times must only be shown when the business has supplied them.
Phone and email must be present and must not be placeholders.
Address should be shown when available; if no visit address exists, the page should still provide clear contact routes.
Map should only render when a real address is supplied.
